allow: Bash(wsl -d Ubuntu -- bash -c 'cat /etc/os-release | grep -E "^NAME|VERSION="; echo "---tools---"; which docker podman docker-compose 2>/dev/null; echo "---node---"; node --version 2>/dev/null; echo "exit"')

Bash(wsl -d Ubuntu -- bash -c 'echo "=== docker working? ==="; docker info --format "{{.ServerVersion}}" 2>&1 | head -3; echo "=== docker compose? ==="; docker compose version 2>&1 | head -1; echo "=== apt-cache podman ==="; apt-cache policy podman 2>&1 | head -5; echo "=== universe enabled? ==="; grep -rh "Components" /etc/apt/sources.list.d/ 2>/dev/null | head; grep -h universe /etc/apt/sources.list 2>/dev/null | head')

Bash(wsl -d Ubuntu -- bash -c 'cd ~/serversFS; echo "=== CRLF check \(1=has CRLF\) ==="; for f in bin/falconDBd bin/forever-start src/reverseProxy/bin/start-dn.sh etc/config etc/dbName; do printf "%s: " "$f"; if grep -lU $'\\''\\r'\\'' "$f" >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo CRLF; else echo LF; fi; done; echo "=== Zone.Identifier count ==="; find . -name "*Zone.Identifier" | wc -l; echo "=== ssh key perms ==="; ls -l srv/rp/.ssh/id_ed25519 2>/dev/null')
